ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Name of the project lead */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., released, in development) */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version the module belongs to */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "full_class_name" TEXT /* Full class name of the module */,
  "wmc" INTEGER /* Weighted Methods per Class (WMC) */,
  "dit" INTEGER /* Depth of Inheritance Tree (DIT) */,
  "noc" INTEGER /* Number of Children (NOC) */,
  "cbo" INTEGER /* Coupling Between Objects (CBO) */,
  "rfc" INTEGER /* Response for a Class (RFC) */,
  "lcom" INTEGER /* Lack of Cohesion in Methods (LCOM) */,
  "ca" INTEGER /* Coupling Aggregation (CA) */,
  "ce" INTEGER /* Coupling Efferent (CE) */,
  "npm" INTEGER /* Number of Public Methods (NPM) */,
  "lcom3" REAL /* Lack of Cohesion in Methods (LCOM3) */,
  "loc" INTEGER /* Lines of Code (LOC) */,
  "dam" INTEGER /* Data Abstraction Coupling (DAM) */,
  "moa" INTEGER /* Method Overloading (MOA) */,
  "mfa" REAL /* Multiplicity of Inheritance (MFA) */,
  "cam" REAL /* Class Association Measure (CAM) */,
  "ic" INTEGER /* Inheritance Coupling (IC) */,
  "cbm" INTEGER /* Class-Based Measure (CBM) */,
  "amc" REAL /* Average Methods per Class (AMC) */,
  "max_cc" INTEGER /* Maximum Cyclomatic Complexity (MAX_CC) */,
  "avg_cc" REAL /* Average Cyclomatic Complexity (AVG_CC) */,
  "bug_count" INTEGER /* Number of bugs found in the module */,
  "complexity_category" TEXT /* Complexity category of the module (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "maintainability_index" REAL /* Maintainability index of the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the module */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "project_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., wmc, dit, noc) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_metrics" (
  "version_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., wmc, dit, noc) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_metrics" (
  "module_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module metric */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., wmc, dit, noc) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_metrics_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the bug belongs to */,
  "bug_description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)
